text: Choose the best word: The words of his resignation letter ......... that he was unhappy with several former colleagues.
note: Both 'implied' and 'signified' fit; 'implied' is the more idiomatic answer.

text: Choose the best word: We understand it's late and we don't mean to ........., but we have some important questions for you.
note: 'Impose' is the idiomatic fit; 'interrupt'/'inconvenience' are defensible.

text: Which of the following words is misspelled?
note: Flawed item: all four words are spelled correctly here (compare Q1's 'Peice').
